verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sickness must be present for healing to take place Lives must be broken so they can be restored We must stop looking at our hard times like they were dead end roads but avenues to prove He is Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It didn't come to stay; it came to pass. The Lord will move that mountain if you'll ask. The trials that we see today won't last. It didn't come to stay, it came to pass.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If I should live by sight I would be beaten down, because I can't see past These walls of circumstances. But faith will be my substance And my hope is in the Lord, and He will turn my sorrow into dance Oh-oh he has turned my sorrow into dance.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause weeping may endure for the night, But I will find the joy, Tomorrow, tomorrow
